home.title: Black. Gold. Welcome.
home.subtitle: Login to reserve tables, order modern Khmer and European fusion dishes, and enjoy the NekMak dining experience.
home.login_prompt: Welcome back. Login with email or social account.
home.signup_prompt: Create your customer account for reservations and ordering.
home.hero_tagline: "Where heat meets heritage, and every cut speaks of perfection."
home.service_desc: NekMak delivers modern Khmer-European fusion in Phnom Penh: Khmer foundations, European technique, premium wine, private bookings, and attentive service for guests who want a dinner with meaning.
home.service_1_text: Pre-booked dinners, anniversary nights, business receptions, and quiet celebrations on Street 240.
home.service_2_text: Golden hour drinks, fresh fruit infusions, local herbs, and precise table service.
home.service_3_text: Khmer roots, European technique, premium wine selection, and seasonal desserts.
home.fusion_1_text: Fish amok, young coconut rice, lok lak, prahok ktis, and river herbs reimagined in modern form.
home.fusion_2_text: French jus, Italian pasta technique, and selected wine service to match the evening in our room.
home.fusion_3_text: Parisian-style pastry with Khmer palm sugar, mango, citrus, and seasonal fruits.
home.refined_dining_desc: Cambodian herbs, Kampot pepper, French sauces, Italian craft, and premium wine pairing in the heart of Phnom Penh.
home.khmer_flame_desc: Fish amok, young coconut rice, lok lak, prahok ktis, and river herbs reimagined in modern form.
home.europe_wine_desc: French jus, Italian pasta technique, and selected wine service to match the evening in our room.
home.pastry_shop_desc: Parisian-style pastry with Khmer palm sugar, mango, citrus, and seasonal fruits.
home.sanctuary_desc: Private dining, wine pairing, anniversary dinners, business receptions, and intimate celebrations on Street 240, Phnom Penh.
home.testimonial_1: NekMak feels like Phnom Penh at night: warm, blue, generous, and full of flavor.
home.testimonial_2: The menu transitions elegantly from Khmer roots to European technique without losing its soul.
home.testimonial_3: A refined, calm experience. Attentive service and deeply authentic Khmer soul in every dish.
home.testimonial_1_quote: NekMak feels like Phnom Penh at night: warm, blue, generous, and full of flavor.
home.testimonial_2_quote: The menu transitions elegantly from Khmer roots to European technique without losing its soul.
home.testimonial_3_quote: A refined, calm experience. Attentive service and deeply authentic Khmer soul in every dish.

menu.desc_europe: European food selection: pizza, burgers, desserts, wine, and garden dishes.
menu.desc_asia_all: Explore our range of Asian dishes.
menu.desc_asia_foods: Khmer dishes, seafood, rice, and Asian flavors.
menu.desc_asia_drinks: Tea, coffee, and beverages to match your dinner.
menu.desc_asia_desserts: Coconut, fruit desserts, and creamy sweets.
menu.desc_asia_wines: Blended wines and pairing options for your meal.
menu.desc_europe_foods: Grilled meats and refined European dishes.
menu.desc_europe_pizza: Stone-baked pizza with fresh toppings and crispy crust.
menu.desc_europe_wines: Khmer and European wines for the evening.

contact.title: Contact Us
contact.subtitle: Elevating Khmer hospitality with a modern architectural sensibility. We are here to help make your journey more than just a meal.

experience.title: Experience
experience.subtitle: The art of dining at NekMak
experience.hero_desc: NekMak Restaurant brings modern Khmer-European fusion to Phnom Penh with chef-plated dishes, curated wines, ambient interiors, and attentive service for an unforgettable evening.
experience.why_heading: A Restaurant Built for Meaningful Evenings
experience.why_desc: Choose NekMak when you want more than just food on a plate. The experience is crafted around flavor, service rhythm, trust, and atmosphere: precise service, authentic Khmer ingredients, European discipline, and a dining room that feels intimate without being cold.
experience.chef_philosophy_heading: Respect the ingredient. Finish with elegance.
experience.chef_philosophy_desc: NekMak plates with restraint: fresh herbs, clean jus, careful heat, balanced acidity, and a sense of occasion that still feels generous.
experience.chef_table_desc: The chef's table at NekMak suits small groups, milestone dates, business guests, and couples who want to know the story of each dish.
experience.step_2: Tasting explanation of each Khmer and European course
experience.step_3: Course finishing with wine pairing selection
experience.step_4: Dessert and final tea or coffee
experience.card_1_text: Khmer foundations meet European technique: fish amok, Kampot pepper crab, fresh Mekong river fish, French jus, and seasonal desserts plated for the table.
experience.card_2_text: NekMak hosts chef's table events for guests who love to watch the finishing pass, hear the story of each ingredient, and enjoy a truly personal meal.
experience.card_3_text: A curated wine selection to match Khmer herbs, Kampot pepper, seafood, and the layered broth of our European-inspired plates.
experience.trust_1_text: NekMak was built for warm service, precise bookings, and a polished dinner experience on Street 240, Phnom Penh.
experience.trust_2_text: The menu follows a confident modern Khmer-European tension, without trying to be everything at once.
experience.trust_3_text: Private dining, anniversary receptions, business entertainment, wine pairing, and chef's table events all find their place here.

footer.brand_desc: Crafting modern fusion dining experiences in the heart of Phnom Penh.

hero.tagline: "Where heat meets heritage, and every cut speaks of perfection."
hero.desc: Access your private system to manage reservations, explore the curated menu, and experience NekMak.
